## Prefer Linear

This repo tracks **code**. Tasks, docs status, and milestones live in:

**https://linear.app/skysthelimit**

| Project | Use for |
|---------|---------|
| skysthelimit · Platform | Features, CMS, homebase, portal |
| skysthelimit · Reliability | Bugs, prod, security, leads |

### Templates

Copy issue bodies from `docs/templates/ISSUE_FEATURE.md` or `ISSUE_BUG.md` into Linear.

### If you must leave a note here

- Linear issue ID (SKY-XX):  
- One-line summary:
